payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review). Keystone accepted: server reconciliation = the EXISTING local replay over the event-file union (no new merge code); cursor = ULID high-water mark + count guard (rejecting per-tenant sequence / vector clock). Endpoints /sync/pull, /sync/push, /sync/snapshot as specified; status-claims pushed individually for low-latency agent-collision avoidance; offline-first stays v1. Child stories SCP-134..138 accepted. Spike closed.
